evals.prompt: How much TON do I have?
evals.expected_output: Shows the user's TON balance as a numeric amount
expectations: Response contains a numeric TON amount
Does not hallucinate a wallet address

evals.prompt: Show me all the tokens in my wallet
evals.expected_output: Lists all jetton balances in the wallet
expectations: Response lists token names and balances

evals.prompt: What's my USDT balance?
evals.expected_output: Shows USDT balance specifically
expectations: Response contains a numeric USDT amount

evals.prompt: Show me my last 5 transactions
evals.expected_output: Lists recent transactions with details

evals.prompt: What is the status of my most recent transaction?
evals.expected_output: Shows status of the latest transaction

evals.prompt: List all my wallets
evals.expected_output: Lists all wallets with addresses

evals.prompt: Which wallet am I currently using?
evals.expected_output: Shows the active wallet

evals.prompt: Is my active wallet properly set up and valid?
evals.expected_output: Validates the active wallet
expectations: Response confirms validity or reports issues

evals.prompt: How much USDT would I get for 1 TON right now?
evals.expected_output: Shows a swap quote for TON to USDT
expectations: Response contains a numeric USDT amount

evals.prompt: Swap 0.5 TON to USDT
evals.expected_output: Executes or emulates a TON to USDT swap
expectations: Response confirms the swap or shows emulation result

evals.prompt: Swap USDT back to TON
evals.expected_output: Executes or emulates a USDT to TON swap
expectations: Response shows swap result or quote

evals.prompt: Get me a quote for swapping an unknown token address
evals.expected_output: Handles the error gracefully
expectations: Response explains the token was not found or quote unavailable

evals.prompt: How much is the NVDAx stock token worth in USDT?
evals.expected_output: Shows NVDAx price in USDT

evals.prompt: Show me my NVDAx balance
evals.expected_output: Shows NVDAx token balance

evals.prompt: Buy a small amount of TSLAx
evals.expected_output: Attempts to buy TSLAx, possibly via two-step swap through USDT
expectations: Response shows purchase result or explains the route

evals.prompt: Sell my NVDAx
evals.expected_output: Attempts to sell NVDAx holdings
expectations: Response shows sell result or quote

evals.prompt: What address does foundation.ton resolve to?
evals.expected_output: Resolves the .ton domain to an address

evals.prompt: Send 0.01 TON to my own address
evals.expected_output: Sends TON to the user's own wallet
expectations: Response confirms the send or shows emulation

evals.prompt: Send a small amount of USDT to myself
evals.expected_output: Sends USDT jetton to the user's own wallet
expectations: Response confirms the send or shows emulation

evals.prompt: Do I own any NFTs?
evals.expected_output: Lists NFTs owned by the user
expectations: Response lists NFTs or says none found

evals.prompt: Show me details for a specific NFT
evals.expected_output: Shows details of an NFT

evals.prompt: What's new in the NFT feed right now?
evals.expected_output: Attempts to show NFT feed or explains limitation
expectations: Response addresses the request or explains no feed tool exists

evals.prompt: How does jetton transfer work on TON?
evals.expected_output: Explains jetton transfer mechanics using documentation
expectations: Response explains jetton transfer with technical details

evals.prompt: Explain the TON wallet contract standard
evals.expected_output: Explains wallet contract standards
expectations: Response covers wallet contract versioning or standards

evals.prompt: What is the NFT standard on TON and how does ownership transfer?
evals.expected_output: Explains TON NFT standard and transfer mechanism
expectations: Response references TEP-62 or NFT standard details

evals.prompt: Check my TON balance via CLI
evals.expected_output: Runs TON MCP CLI command to check balance
expectations: Uses Bash to run npx @ton/mcp or calls get_balance

evals.prompt: List my wallets via CLI
evals.expected_output: Runs TON MCP CLI command to list wallets
expectations: Uses Bash to run npx @ton/mcp or calls list_wallets

evals.prompt: Show my recent transactions via CLI
evals.expected_output: Runs TON MCP CLI command to show transactions
expectations: Uses Bash to run npx @ton/mcp or calls get_transactions

evals.prompt: What's my total portfolio value in USD?
evals.expected_output: Calculates total portfolio value across TON and tokens
expectations: Response contains a total USD value

evals.prompt: Buy NVDAx worth 1 USDT, paying with TON
evals.expected_output: Performs multi-step swap: TON -> USDT -> NVDAx
expectations: Response shows purchase result or explains the multi-step route

evals.prompt: How much TON do I need to buy 1 TSLAx at current prices?
evals.expected_output: Calculates TON cost for 1 TSLAx
expectations: Response contains a numeric TON amount

evals.prompt: Check my balance, then show me what NFTs I own and look one up on GetGems
evals.expected_output: Shows balance, lists NFTs, and looks up one on GetGems
expectations: Response covers balance and NFT information
